assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 8 shows the exact query: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. This contains 'labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA')' matching the assertion.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md documents all 3 candidates (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026) and for each inspects issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'. TC-9020 shows TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 shows TC-9024 (Done) and TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 shows '(none)'. The overview explicitly states: 'Each candidate is evaluated by inspecting its issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type "Depend"'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 45 shows TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with 'Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. ready-for-qa.md confirms: 'All 2 linked remediation Tasks are in a completed state (Done or Closed)' and 'Result: INCLUDED in Ready for QA list.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 51: 'TC-9023 ... Excluded: TC-9025 is still In Progress. Remediation is not yet complete.' ready-for-qa.md confirms: 'TC-9025 is still In Progress... Result: EXCLUDED — Remediation is still in progress.'

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 52: 'TC-9026 ... Excluded: No linked Tasks with Depend link type. No remediation to verify.' ready-for-qa.md confirms: 'No issuelinks with link type "Depend" were found on this issue... Result: EXCLUDED — No linked Tasks with Depend type. No remediation to verify.'

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 43-45 show a table with a 'Remediation Tasks' column header. The TC-9020 row includes 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' in that column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 47: 'Recommendation for TC-9020: Consider transitioning to ON_QA. All linked remediation Tasks have been completed.' ready-for-qa.md line 38-39: 'Suggested action: Transition TC-9020 to ON_QA.' TC-9020 is the only issue in Ready for QA, so this covers all Ready for QA issues.
